curation_notes: Re-curation with updated hints. Patch commit d33d3cd is a merge of PR #3095 (fix/xss_profile_form). Two files changed: the Django template generic_field.html removed the |safe filter from error message rendering (the primary XSS fix), and twocols_nav.js changed form targeting from $('form').first() to $(e.target).closest('form') in the listen function. Locations derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling templates contain the same |safe-on-errors pattern. L1/L2/L3 hints rewritten to follow updated guidelines: L1 broadened to avoid revealing vulnerability type, L2 scrubbed of location-revealing details, L3 narrowed to Django form field templates and form submission handlers.
